svn diff for www/hiawatha (patch)

I recently decided to give hiawatha a go, on one of my servers,
and noticed it was unmaintained. So Maintaining it just seemed
like the right thing to do(tm). :)

CHANGES

MAINTAINER

That's it!

As always, thanks for all the hard work you do here! :)

--Chris
